task.title: Add S3 upload retry logic
task.body: The upload handler should retry transient S3 failures up to 3 times with exponential backoff.

expert.name: Architect
expert.perspective: You focus on long-term maintainability, clean abstractions, and consistency with existing patterns.

args.directions_text:
A: Use boto3 built-in retry config
B: Implement manual retry loop in application code
C: Use a third-party retry library (tenacity)
